summary: Partner Listings & Media Pack testing completed. 25/25 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend pages and flows working correctly. Fixed bug in partner_listing_submission_routes.py where empty images array caused IndexError on listing creation.

partner_auth.notes: Login works with demo@supplier.com/partner123. Returns access_token, user, and partner info.

partner_listing_submission.notes: Full CRUD for partner listings. Validates required fields (SKU, name). Rejects duplicate SKUs. Product and service listings both work. BUG FIXED: Empty images array no longer causes IndexError.

media_upload.notes: Validates file types (images: jpg,png,webp,gif; documents: pdf,doc,xlsx). Rejects invalid file types. Successful upload returns URL.

csv_import.notes: CSV template downloads successfully. Preview validates rows and reports errors (missing SKU, duplicate SKU, etc).

admin_marketplace_listings.notes: Admin can list all marketplace items with filters (listing_type, approval_status, country_code). Stats endpoint returns total, published, pending counts.

public_marketplace.notes: Public endpoints correctly hide internal fields (partner_id, base_partner_price, admin_notes). Country-specific catalog filtering works.

partner_login_page.notes: Login form with email/password fields. Error message displays for invalid credentials. Successful login redirects to /partner dashboard.

partner_dashboard.notes: Shows partner name (Demo Supplier Co), stats cards (Catalog Items, Active Allocations, Pending Fulfillment, Settlement Estimate), Partner Information, Quick Actions.

partner_catalog_page.notes: Shows tabs for Basic Catalog and Rich Listings with item counts. Rich Listing and Quick Add buttons in header.

partner_listing_editor.notes: Product/Service type selection. Product Family / Service Family dropdown. Form fields for SKU, Slug, Name, Description, Category, Price, Qty, Status, Lead Time. Form validation shows red error messages for missing required fields.

partner_bulk_upload.notes: File drop zone for CSV/XLSX. Download CSV Template button works. How it works instructions and Field Reference table displayed.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED BUG: partner_listing_submission_routes.py line 105 - Empty images array caused IndexError when accessing [0]. Changed from (payload.get('images', [None])[0]) to (payload.get('images', []) or [None])[0]
Partner authentication uses separate JWT secret (PARTNER_JWT_SECRET) from main app
Public marketplace endpoints correctly hide internal pricing and partner info from public view
CSV import preview validates all required fields before allowing commit

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All partner portal pages load and function correctly)

seed_data_creation: Test listings created during testing with SKUs starting with TEST-LISTING-, TEST-SERVICE-, TEST-CSV-, TEST-DUP-, TEST-UI-FIX-
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Listings & Media Pack fully tested and working. Partner authentication uses separate JWT system. Bug fixed in partner_listing_submission_routes.py - empty images array was causing IndexError when creating listings without images. All partner portal pages (Dashboard, Catalog, Create Listing, Bulk Upload) tested and working. CSV template download works. Import preview validates required fields.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: POST /api/partner-listings returned 500 error when creating listing without images
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Line 105 in partner_listing_submission_routes.py accessed [0] on payload.get('images', [None]) which fails when images is an empty list [] (not None)
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed to (payload.get('images', []) or [None])[0] which ensures we always have at least [None] to access when images is empty
